title: stellaria longipes subsp. arenicola
intro: Stellaria longipes subsp. arenicola, also known as sandstar or dryland starwort, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the carnation family Caryophyllaceae. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating digestive issues and skin problems due to its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Stellaria longipes subsp. arenicola include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and promote wound healing, making it a valuable herb in traditional medicine. Herbal preparations of Stellaria longipes subsp. arenicola can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to alleviate various health issues.
